name: Eira Ashflame
sd_appearance: In the heart of the Undercity's Guild of Ashen Scrolls, Eira Ashflame stands, her imposing build and towering height a testament to her genasi heritage. Her fiery red hair cascades down her waist, framing a face with smoky eyes that burn like embers. She is clad in ash-white archival robes, adorned with multiple sealed scroll cases, and a scholar's robe that reveals ink-stained hands, reading lenses, and reinforced elbows. A dagger, a last resort, is sheathed at her side, while multiple scroll cases dot her person. A single, distinctive visual detail — an intricate silver pentagram pendant hanging around her neck — sets her apart among the scholars of the Guild.
faction_visual: ash-white archival robes, multiple sealed scroll cases, fate-reading tools
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
